Sloths can hold their breath underwater for up to 40 minutes by slowing down their heart rate, which is longer than a dolphin can!
If you could drive your car straight up into the sky at highway speed, you would reach outer space in just about one hour.
An average fluffy cumulus cloud looks completely weightless, but it actually weighs about 1.1 million pounds—the equivalent of roughly 100 elephants floating in the air!
The eye of a giant squid can grow up to thirty centimetres in diameter, which is about the same size as a dinner plate.
The Eiffel Tower can grow up to fifteen centimetres taller during the summer. This happens because the high temperatures cause the metal structure to expand.
